template.name: Outbound — 3-Step Cold Cadence (Email + LinkedIn)
template.description: Contact-keyed cold outbound workbook. Takes a verified-email contact list, generates per-contact first line + subject line via Claygent, gates strictly on Sending Gate, and pushes to a sequencer with per-step eligibility (email-1, LinkedIn-connect, email-2). Designed to attach to abm-account-keyed-tier-1 + an email waterfall.
template.estimated_cost_per_row: 10-12 credits per contact at the Claygent layer (assumes email waterfall ran upstream)
template.expected_match_rate: Sending Gate pass rate: 50-70% of enriched rows; Read-Out-Loud pass on first lines: target 18/20
required_resources: SalesLoft or Outreach or Apollo or Smartlead or 11x

columns.name: trigger_event
columns.notes: From upstream account workbook (optional but feeds first_line)

columns.name: suppression_check
columns.formula_text: LOOKUP({{SUPPRESSION_TABLE_ID}}, email) != NULL OR LOOKUP({{SUPPRESSION_TABLE_ID}}, company_domain) != NULL OR EXISTS(prior_contact_in_last_30_days)

columns.name: sending_gate_eligible
columns.formula_text: AND(email IS NOT NULL, email_verified_status IN ["valid", "accept_all_high"], linkedin_url IS NOT NULL, suppression_check == FALSE, seniority IN [{{TARGET_SENIORITY}}], account_tier IN [{{ELIGIBLE_TIERS}}])
columns.notes: Global Rule 2: required before any sequencer push

columns.name: personalization_source
first_line
columns.claygent_prompt:
ROLE: Peer-to-peer B2B sales rep writing the OPENING line of a cold email.

CONTEXT:
- Recipient: {first_name}, {title}
- Observation: {personalization_source.observation}
- Tie to pain: {personalization_source.tie_to_pain}
- URL evidence: {personalization_source.url}

VOICE: {{VOICE_DESCRIPTOR}}

TASK:
Write ONE sentence (15-25 words) that:
- Leads with the observation (NOT "I came across" or "I noticed")
- Sounds like a colleague, not a vendor
- Sets up the pain naturally for sentence 2

Banned words: unlock, leverage, supercharge, hope, came across, noticed
Banned starts: "I", "Hope", "Hi {name}"

FORMAT:
Return the sentence ONLY. No quotes, no signature.

FALLBACK:
Return: "[no personalization available]" — this will skip step 1 via gate.
columns.notes: MUST run /clay-claygent-iterator before scaling past 25 rows. Read-Out-Loud test is mandatory.

columns.name: subject_line
columns.claygent_prompt:
ROLE: B2B subject line writer. 3-6 words, no emoji, no ALL CAPS, no clickbait.

CONTEXT:
- Recipient: {first_name} at {company_name}
- Trigger: {trigger_event}
- Pain category: {pain_research.category}

TASK:
Write a 3-6 word subject. One of these patterns:
- "{specific_term} at {company_name}?"
- "{trigger_event} → {pain_category}?"
- "{first_name} - quick context"
- "{specific_noun_they_use_internally}"

FORMAT: Subject line only.

columns.name: step_1_eligible
columns.formula_text: AND(sending_gate_eligible == TRUE, LENGTH(first_line) >= 30, NOT(first_line CONTAINS "[no personalization available]"))

columns.name: linkedin_step_eligible
columns.formula_text: AND(sending_gate_eligible == TRUE, linkedin_url IS NOT NULL, linkedin_connection_status != "connected")

columns.name: step_2_eligible
columns.formula_text: AND(step_1_eligible == TRUE, step_1_sent_at IS NOT NULL, step_1_replied != TRUE, step_1_bounced != TRUE, DAYS_SINCE(step_1_sent_at) >= 3, DAYS_SINCE(step_1_sent_at) <= 10)

actions.name: sequencer_push_linkedin
actions.notes: Optional — only if LinkedIn automation tool connected

verification_checklist: Sending Gate filter manually verified on 20 rows (no false TRUEs)
Read-Out-Loud first lines: 18/20 pass peer-tone test
Subject lines all 3-6 words, no emoji, no clichés
Sequencer test push lands 5 contacts in cadence correctly
CRM dedups (no duplicate contacts on resubmit)
Step 2 cadence respects 3-10 day window AND bounce/reply checks
